message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #000000
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam activationBorderColor #000000

actor User
participant "JobManager" as JM
participant "Nodes" as N
participant "ESDM" as E
participant "Post Processing Library" as PPL
participant "Storage" as S

User -> JM: submit job(IN, OUT)
JM -> N: 
note over E: Initialization
N -> S: read IN=x
S --> N: return

note over E: Loop
N -> N: compute
N -> E: write async OUT=y
activate E
E -> S: write snapshot (async)
E -> PPL: trigger post processing if region effected
note over E: In Situ Post Processing
PPL -> PPL: perform post processing
note right of PPL: (could write result directly)
PPL -> S: 
PPL --> E: return
E -> S: write post processing result
E --> N: return
N --> User: OUT files become visible
deactivate E

note over E: multiple iterations

note over E: Finalize
User <-- S: All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

@enduml
